title: Register my address (Anmeldung)
description: Step-by-step guidance for registering a Munich address (Anmeldung) after moving in, including required documents and common blockers.
intent_examples: I need to register where I live
I moved to a new flat

stages.goal: Find out whether the user already has an apartment to register

option_sets.prompt: Do you already have an apartment to register?

stages.goal: Explain the Anmeldung steps and the exact documents needed to register an address
stages.retrieval_query: Wohnsitz anmelden Anmeldung registration office Bürgerbüro required documents Wohnungsgeberbestätigung Munich

options.label: I don't have a landlord confirmation
I need help filling the form

stages.goal: Explain the landlord confirmation (Wohnungsgeberbestätigung): what it is, what it must contain, and how to obtain it
stages.retrieval_query: Wohnungsgeberbestätigung landlord confirmation Vermieterbescheinigung what it contains how to get Anmeldung

stages.goal: Explain how to book an Anmeldung appointment at the Bürgerbüro and what to do if no appointment is available
stages.retrieval_query: Bürgerbüro Termin appointment booking Anmeldung online no appointment available Munich
